essential_question: Can you explain, out loud, what you built and why it works?
objective: Prepare and deliver a short walkthrough of the year's strongest builds, explaining the math behind each.

content.heading: Five minutes, three builds
bullets: Pick your three strongest builds from yesterday's portfolio pass.
For each: what it is, what math it proves, and how you made it — one sentence each.
Then present it out loud, like showing someone who wasn't there all year.

content.heading: Write it before you say it

content.preview: Session 3: Transcript Close — mastery review across all 30 lessons.

success_criteria.text: I can prepare a clear, math-grounded explanation of my best builds
I can present my work out loud and respond to a question about it

compass.note: Curriculum/Geometry/The Salas Compass/2026-W40 Portfolio Show & Transcript Close.md

questions.prompt: Prepare a short walkthrough of your best 3 builds. For each, write one sentence: what it is, what math it proves, and how you made it.
Present your walkthrough out loud — to a parent, sibling, or on video. Note who you presented to and how it went.
What question did your audience ask that you hadn't thought about? How did you answer it?
Exit: which build are you proudest of, and why?
